name: NS1_Elements
rows: DNS queries NS1 answers, in millions/month (MQ)
Required for every Managed DNS deal; overage applies above band
Fully-qualified domain name + record type (e.g. www.example.com Type A)
Traffic-steering rule set on a record
One per record needing steering; unlimited filters per chain free; RUM/GSLB filters cost extra
Up/down monitor for a server/infra element
One per hostname/IP; NS1's own or client's own = same charge
